Home / Tools / FunnelCockpit

FunnelCockpit

Category: funnel builder, landing pages, and email automation

Overview

FunnelCockpit provides an integrated environment for building marketing funnels, managing mailing lists, and launching campaigns without stitching multiple tools together.

Key features

  • Drag-and-drop funnel builder and landing page templates.
  • Email automation with sequencing and tagging.
  • Conversion tracking and campaign reports.
  • Templates for product launches and lead magnets.

Action

Get FunnelCockpit Read the review Back to Tools Directory

Quick Facts

Product: FunnelCockpit

Focus: Funnels, landing pages, email automation

Best For: Affiliate marketers, course creators, launches
